title: MANGA GOS2 Angelic Days volume 2 already out
display_title: MANGA GOS2 Angelic Days volume 2 already out
wikitext:
[]: [GOS2] Angelic Days volume 2 already out?             Quote Post by TriLink » Wed Aug 02, 2006 1:04 pm Hey everybody, long time reader, first time poster (little bell rings in background). Don't know bout the rest of you, but I was under the impression that Angelic Days Vol 2 would be released in late August, so imagine my suprise when visiting Amazon that they had changed the date from August 26 to JULY 26 meaning that it has already been out for a couple of days now! As of yet, I have been unable to get my grubby little, Eva craving hands on it (Amazon said it wouldn't ship for 2 to 3 weeks). Anyone know what the deal is?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 02, 2006 2:34 pm So it would seem, thanks for bringing it to our attention.

[]:             Quote Post by PilotIkari » Wed Aug 09, 2006 8:13 am I've been waiting the best part of a month for by vol.1's of both Eva series to arrive from AmazonUK

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Wed Aug 09, 2006 6:05 pm PilotIkari wrote: I've been waiting the best part of a month for by vol.1's of both Eva series to arrive from AmazonUK

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sun Aug 13, 2006 4:49 am If anyone would be kind enough to tell me. How far is Vol 2? I wanna buy it, but it would be a waste of money buying a book full of chapters I already got from EvaMonkey!

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Sun Aug 13, 2006 6:17 am I suppose that the distribution of the chapters in "Angelic Days" and the German "the Iron Maiden 2nd" mangas are the same, so this would be the chapters that are in the respective volumes: Vol. 1: chapter 1-4 + extra-story Vol. 2: chapter 5-8 Vol. 3: chapter 1-4 Vol. 4: chapter 1-4 Don't ask me, why they restartet the numbering in Vol. 3 & 4 Oo

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Sun Aug 13, 2006 2:30 pm What is Angelic Days 2 exactly? Is it a manga based on Iron Maiden 2, or something else? And what is Angelic Days 1 for that matter?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 13, 2006 4:35 pm reagen wrote: If anyone would be kind enough to tell me. How far is Vol 2? I wanna buy it, but it would be a waste of money buying a book full of chapters I already got from EvaMonkey!

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Mon Aug 14, 2006 9:09 am Sorry, EvaMonkey....some of us live on a REALLY-REALLY low budget!! :(

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Mon Aug 14, 2006 1:55 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: reagen wrote: If anyone would be kind enough to tell me. How far is Vol 2? I wanna buy it, but it would be a waste of money buying a book full of chapters I already got from EvaMonkey!
